description: Plan a daytime telescope public outreach event at Griffith Observatory (34.118° N, 118.300° W, 350 m) for June 4, 2023, at 21:00 UTC. Configure Stellarium to represent daytime conditions with the atmosphere, azimuthal coordinate grid, and labels for planets and stars enabled. Capture screenshots of Venus, Jupiter, and Sirius centered in the view to ~/Pictures/stellarium/. Document the outreach plan in a text file at ~/Desktop/daytime_outreach_plan.txt, including the location (Griffith), the month (June), and the three targets (Venus, Jupiter, Sirius).
